takeoff.processing_notes: Files 6090, 6100, 6110, 6120, 6130, 6170, 6210, 6220, 6230, 6240, 6250, 6260, 6270, 6280, 6290, 6300, 8011, and 8013 were reviewed. Files 6090-6130 and 6210-6300 were image-based with no extractable text. Files 6170, 8011, and 8013 contained some extractable text, but quantities were often unclear or required assumptions to be made.
